title: HSE Company Card
description: Schema for branding/company-card.yaml (A9 §3.2) — the editable identity-and-attribution card every skill carries. Clean A4↔A9 split: this card holds identity + the report_branding_default bridge flag ONLY. The logo, colour palette, cover image, and fonts live in A4's brand.yaml — a card declaring `logo` or `palette` (top-level or under `company`) is REJECTED here (additionalProperties:false at both levels).
